event: View of Venetian Rooftops at Sunset with Domed Churches
symbols: the domed churches silhouetted against the sunset — Venice's ecclesiastical skyline, the visible markers of faith on the horizon
the dramatic sunset sky — orange, crimson, and blue clouds creating a luminous backdrop over the city
the rooftops in shadow — the daily world below, contrasted with the radiant sky above
description: A panoramic view across the rooftops of Venice at sunset. The lower portion of the painting shows terracotta rooftops and the walls of buildings in warm shadow, including a tall structure on the left. On the right horizon, the silhouettes of large domed churches -- likely the Basilica of Santa Maria della Salute or similar -- rise against the sky. The upper two-thirds of the composition is dominated by a spectacular sunset: billowing clouds in cream and gray float against a sky transitioning from deep blue at the top through turquoise to vivid orange and crimson at the horizon.
